milestones: The output contains all five sections ([Question 1] through [Question 5]) with their corresponding headers matching the required format
Question 1 states a single specific research question directly related to graph-level anomaly detection
Question 2 discusses both broader research community implications and practical applications of solving the proposed problem
Question 3 identifies at least one concrete technical or theoretical challenge and explains why naive or straightforward approaches would fail
Question 4 references gaps or limitations in existing graph-level anomaly detection methods and clearly distinguishes the proposed approach from prior work
Question 5 describes a concrete methodology specifying the proposed method/framework, target datasets, and evaluation metrics
